---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# operation

```{julia}
# basic number operation
A = sigmax()
exp(A)
sin(A)
cos(A)
sqrtm(A)
logm(A)
expm(A)
```

```{julia}
# basic matrix operation
ket2dm(ψ)        # ket -> density matrix
expect(O, ψ)     # 期望值
variance(O, ψ)   # 方差
ptrace(ρ, sel)   # partial trace
tr(A)            # trace
norm(A)          # 范数
normalize(A)
unit(A)          # normalize 的同义函数
```

```{julia}
# eigen
using QuantumToolbox

H = sigmax()
eigenenergies(H) # eigenvalues
eigenstates(H) # 本征值 + 本征态
eigsolve(H; eigvals=1) # 稀疏/大矩阵部分本征解
```
